content.en:
Ye Tian put away the True Blood Fruit and stood there, silently staring at the other god generals.

If it was an ordinary god general who seized the True Blood Fruit, these God Generals would definitely not give up, but Ye Tian seized this True Blood Fruit, but the God generals present did not dare to besiege it.

Because Ye Tian was too powerful, he had not yet burst out of his full strength just now, and he easily shocked all of them, if they really fought, they didn't know how many people would die.

Moreover, there was more than one True Blood Fruit on the True Blood Tree, and they could continue to wait.

Canglong Divine General stood up, in the early stage of the dual universe fusion, he was only a two-star early stage god general, but he also got several big opportunities for such a long time, and his strength has improved a lot, and now he is a two-star late stage god general.

"Ten Thousand Law Divine General, you have obtained a True Blood Fruit, we can not snatch it, but you must leave here immediately. "

The dragon god will say.

"Leave?" Ye Tian sneered, "Why are you leaving, just one true blood fruit can't satisfy my appetite!"

"You're so greedy!"

The Canglong God General frowned, and the other God Generals were also furious.

One True Blood Fruit was enough to increase his strength a lot, and Ye Tian even wanted more True Blood Fruits!

Moreover, the forbidden land of the Blood Sea is the forbidden land of the Cangyu Universe, this True Blood Tree strictly belongs to the Cangyu Universe, and Ye Tian belongs to the invasion here, and if you get a True Blood Fruit, you should be satisfied and leave.

There are actually not many true blood fruits on the True Blood Tree, there are only a few dozen in total, and there are only seven or eight that are really close to maturity, and the other True Blood Fruits are estimated to take millions of years to mature.

And they couldn't wait that long, so every True Blood Fruit was important enough to make them desperate.

"If you don't accept it, then fight!"

Ye Tian was not afraid, and a group of one- and two-star god generals dared to question him?

"You ......"

The Canglong God General was extremely angry, but he did not make a move immediately, but secretly communicated with the other God Generals.

If Ye Tian didn't leave, if he wanted to occupy the True Blood Fruit, they wouldn't be able to stop Ye Tian one-on-one.

"Everyone, what should we do now, the Ten Thousand Law God will be stronger than us, if we stay here, we won't be able to snatch him at all. "

"Let's join forces, with our strength should be enough to inflict a heavy blow on him, if he doesn't want to fall, he will definitely flee. "

"But in this way, we will completely offend the Ten Thousand Law Divine General, and if he assassinates us later, we will be in danger!"

"Hehe, are you scared? if we snatch a True Blood Fruit, it will be enough to increase our chances of detachment. If you're afraid, give up, I'm not going to give up anyway!"

"Fight, maybe we can join forces and hope to kill the Ten Thousand Law Gods!"

......

After a group of god generals discussed, they decided to join forces to besiege Ye Tian.

"Spear of the Sun!"

"Heavenly Hand!"

"Endless Illusion!"

"Death funeral!"

"Shattered Void!"

One god general performed a special move, and broke out one by one with the power of the strongest treasure to suppress Ye Tian.

The attack of so many god generals has reached the level of a three-star god general, and even if a weaker three-star god will face such a situation, it is estimated that it will be hit hard.

However, they were facing Ye Tian, a three-star peak divine general, and he had a life-saving divine power such as the Great Immortal Technique, which was the top 100 great divine powers in the chaos, and had reached the realm of Xiaocheng, how terrifying its defensive effect was.

Thundered!!!

Many attacks bombarded Ye Tian's body, and even Ye Tian's defense was not broken.

"You dare to attack me, you are very bold, but it's a pity that the attack is too weak!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"What, how is this possible?"

"Impossible, how can you withstand so many attacks?"

"I don't believe it, you must be seriously injured, and you're pretending to be right now!"

One god general panicked, even frightened.

"Great Destruction!"

With a wave of Ye Tian's hand, the top-notch Great Divine Power Great Destruction Technique turned into a light of destruction and swept away.

Immediately, the three gods will be enveloped, and their bodies will be powdered by the Great Destruction Technique.

Although these three god generals are all one-star god generals, one of them is a one-star peak god general and is good at saving his life, even if it is a two-star god general's full force, it is difficult to hurt this blood weeping god general, but now he has been beaten into powder by Ye Tian's move.

"Run!"

The other gods will turn into rays of light and fly away, not daring to stay here any longer.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill, just a group of ants, it didn't matter to him whether he killed or not.

Besides, these people did not pose any threat to him.

Outside the Forbidden Zone of the Sea of Blood.

A group of gods fled in a hurry, and when they saw that Ye Tian did not chase and kill, they immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

"The Ten Thousand Law Divine General is definitely not a three-star early stage god general, I'm afraid it is already a three-star peak god general, not to mention a one-star god general just now, even if it is a two-star peak god general, I'm afraid it won't be able to stop it at all!"

"Yes, if it weren't for the fact that the gods of all laws didn't want to kill us, we wouldn't have survived at all. It's terrifying, how could there be such a powerful god general?" the other god general was shocked.

"What should we do, we just give up the True Blood Fruit?"

One of the gods frowned.

"Give up, although the True Blood Fruit is precious, we have to save our lives, and the Ten Thousand Law Gods will also occupy all the True Blood Fruits, those True Blood Fruits that take a long time to mature, he will definitely not be able to wait, we still have a chance." Moreover, the Ten Thousand Law Gods will be waiting here for the True Blood Fruit to ripen, and we can completely look for other opportunities, so there is no need to spend it here!"

The sun god will say.

"Okay, then let's leave and look for other opportunities!"

One by one, the gods left, and only Ye Tian was left in the entire Blood Sea Forbidden Zone.

In the following years, Ye Tian waited for the true blood fruit to ripen while hunting the blood beasts in the sea of blood and seizing the blood crystals on their bodies.

The sea of blood was very large, and many blood beasts were born, and the number of Ye Tian's blood crystals was increasing.

Another 6,000 years passed, and Ye Tian obtained the second True Blood Fruit, and obtained more than 10 million Blood Crystals.

After another 8,000 years, Ye Tian obtained the third True Blood Fruit, but the blood crystals harvested were only more than 5 million, because there were not many blood beasts born.

And Ye Tian didn't waste such a long time, most of the time was spent on cultivation, and most of the blood crystals obtained in it were used to cultivate the Xuanxu Jue, and he successfully cultivated the Xuanxu Jue to the fourth layer of Xiaocheng realm, and his strength was raised to the three-star extreme, which was only one step away from the combat power of the four-star god general.

......

Terran.

Kunwu Dizun and Mixed Yuan Dizun and others were discussing a matter.

"Hasn't the Ten Thousand Laws God come back yet?"

Kunwu Di respects the way.

"Still cultivating in the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone!" Mixed Yuan Earth Venerable said: "Let's not disturb the Ten Thousand Law Divine Generals for the time being, but the affairs of the new universe must also be paid attention to, and the Earth Venerable stationed there must be notified and report the situation at any time." "

"Well, the rules of the new universe are stronger, and a lot of opportunities have been born, and even some innate origin things have been born, but it's a pity that the Ten Thousand Law Gods will not be there, and our human race has obtained too few treasures, and most of the treasures have been taken away by the powerhouses of the Cangyu Universe!" Kun Wu Dizun sighed.

"Those treasures are nothing, but the recent changes in the new universe must be paid attention to, I always feel that the changes there are not simple, and there is no one to enter the huge area, not even the gods and generals can enter, it is too unusual!"

The Terran Earth Venerable was discussing one by one, and the area of the new universe that no one could enter gradually spread, and even attracted many strong people to explore, but no one knew the reason.

this day.

Ye Tian came out of the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone!
